text: {"acknowledges_specifics":true,"no_unverifiable_promise":true,"states_next_steps":true,"invents_no_policy":true,"consistent_with_gold":true,"within_length":false,"justification":"The draft directly answers who the counterparty is, how prices are set, and how legs are matched, makes no guarantees, explains what happens if legs match or remain unmatched, introduces no new rules, aligns with the gold notes’ P2P parlay matching, but it’s longer than a few short sentences."}
